agent_trace.raw_tail:
benchmarks/pinch_test_latest/us_federal/20260314T235815Z/workspaces/task_21_openclaw_comprehension/run_01"
pdf_path = os.path.join(workspace, "openclaw_report.pdf")

# 读取 PDF 内容
with pdfplumber.open(pdf_path) as pdf:
    full_text = ""
    for page in pdf.pages:
        text = page.extract_text()
        if text:
            full_text += text + "\n"

print(f"PDF pages: {len(pdf.pages)}")
print(f"Total text length: {len(full_text)}")
print("\n=== First 3000 chars ===")
print(full_text[:3000])
```
